subject: Abstract energy art — a dark geometric star shape enclosed in a glowing white-silver sphere
description: A dark five-pointed or geometric star shape is suspended at the center of a luminous white and silver sphere. The sphere glows with soft radial energy, and the background is a gradient of pale blue and white. The overall aesthetic is clean, abstract, and mechanical — energy visualized as captured light around a dark core.
foreground: dark star shape inside a glowing white energy sphere
